overview.short: Chandoli National Park is a national park established in Sangli district in May 2004.
overview.description: Chandoli National Park is a national park established in Sangli district in May 2004. Earlier it was a Wildlife Sanctuary declared in 1985.

topPlaces.name: Prachitgad
topPlaces.description: Prachitgad is a fort in the Sahyadri mountain range in Sangli district of Maharashtra state, India. It covers an area of 5 acres (20,000 m2).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chandoli National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chandoli National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chandoli National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (80 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (149 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chandoli National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chandoli National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chandoli National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Chandoli National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
